heading: Nonapplicability of Federal Advisory Committee Act
label: 8211 Nonapplicability of Federal Advisory Committee Act
notes: Amendments2024— substituted “Chapter 10 of title 5 (commonly known as the ‘Federal Advisory Committee Act’),” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 118–198
